center.name: 普埃布拉州
center.summary: 普埃布拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Clark's grebe、West Mexican chachalaca、棕腹蜂鸟等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: relicta is found in six southwestern Mexico states, Jalisco, Colima, Morelos, Puebla, Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Boucard's wren is found in south-central Mexico, in the states of Puebla, Morelos, Guerrero, and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Checklist dataset |publisher=GBIF Secretariat |doi=10.15468/39omei |access-date=25 November 2018}} The range of this bird in Mexico is distributed in two streaks southward; one from the California border along the Pacific coast throughout Baja California and across the gulf along the coast to southern Sonora, the other a higher altitude, inland distribution running down from the Big Bend region behind the Texas border down the mountains of central Mexico, with the highest concentration in population in the south from Jalisco to Puebla and northern Oaxaca, where the distribution abruptly ceases

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ocai: eastern Puebla and west-central Veracruz in the east-central The collared towhee inhabits the edges of pine-oak and montane evergreen forest and also scrublands in the subtropical and temperate zones.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate is found in the Trans-Mexican Volcanic Belt from Jalisco and Michoacán east to western Puebla

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: villai is found in southern Mexico between Puebla and Oaxaca. The ocellated thrasher inhabits a variety of landscapes including arid and semi-arid scrub and the brushy understory of oak and pine-oak forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: interior is found in south-central Mexico from Jalisco south to western Puebla and Oaxaca. T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Chaparral nesting habitat in California This bird is found in the southwestern United States and Mexico from sea level up to , though it tends to be found between . It lives in California, southern Arizona, southern New Mexico, Texas, and central Oklahoma south along Baja California and in western Mexico to southern Puebla and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The West Mexican chachalaca is found in a swath of southwestern Mexico between northern Jalisco and southwestern Chiapas and inland as far as southwestern Puebla

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: vanrossemi is found in Mexico from the southern parts of the states of Michoacán, México, and Puebla south to most of Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: marshalli is the more northerly of the two; it is found in southern Puebla and perhaps into eastern Guerrero

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cerviniventris is found year-round from central Veracruz south through Puebla and Oaxaca to northern Chiapas. The buff-bellied hummingbird inhabits a variety of landscapes in its year-round range, most of which are semi-open to open and rather dry
